string-array.name: alarm_set
string-array.item: Alarm set for less than 1 minute from now.
Alarm set for %1$s and %2$s from now.
Alarm set for %1$s and %3$s from now.
Alarm set for %2$s and %3$s from now.
Alarm set for %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s from now.

string-array.name: sw_share_strings
string-array.item: Enjoy the fruits of your labor.
Androids are known to be fast, but not as fast as you!
Let\'s do the time warp again.
Just a jump to the left.
You have a palette for haste.

resources.string: Note: These options are only valid for full screen alarm notifications
Note: For this device flip and shake actions will be disabled while using wireless charging
Sound playback service for alarms set in Clock.
Alarm set for %s. Touch to cancel.
Audio stream for local alarm sounds
While traveling in an area where the time is different, add a clock for home
The city already exists in the database
Tap to localize your current city
GPS query returns no location results
Tap alarm time to toggle. Long-press to edit alarm time.
Always use full screen alarms instead of peek notification
Screen will not be turned off when alarm is active
If the screen stays on dim it when alarm is active
Your missed alarm has been deleted
No default alarm ringtone set in system settings.
No Spotify support available.\nPlease select a different alarm type.
Dismissing active pre-alarm will also dismiss main alarm
Snooze instead of dismiss after silence timeout
Stopwatch service to run the notification.
Failed to take persistent grant permission for ringtone
Sound playback service for timers set in Clock.
Enable vibration for active alarm and timer notifications
Show alarm and timer notification on connected wearable devices
Weather information isn\'t available right now.
